description: multiclaude — inject a compact, cached wallet-headroom snapshot (Codex / Claude block / AGY) at session start and before each Task/Workflow dispatch, so orchestration routes with live limits in view and avoids starting work a window cannot finish (orchestrate s0/s5). Non-blocking: serves cache instantly, refreshes ccusage in the background. Exec form (node + args, no shell) so it runs identically on Linux, macOS, and Windows.
